title: RECOVERY CAFE ROSEWAY - 211info
text: RECOVERY CAFE ROSEWAY RECOVERY CAFE ROSEWAY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a place for recovery peer support and connections through recovery circles, community meals, an espresso bar, and various calendar events. Peer support hours may include help accessing health, employment, housing, and treatment services. 3516 NE 71st Avenue Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Membership based which requires: -Drug and alcohol free when entering the cafe community space -Attend a weekly Recovery Circle -Contribute to the cafe community through acts of service Hours: Tuesday-Thursday 11am-4pm, lunch 12:15pm-1:30pm Email (971) 459-9899 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 459-9899 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Visit website or call for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet buses 12, 24 Services: Community Meals General Addictions/Substance Use Disorder Support Groups Peer Mental Health Support Services Specialized Information and Referral * Substance Use Disorder Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
